base_url.description: Your Gorgias account's API base URL, e.g. https://<domain>.gorgias.com/api (domain_name-derived base URL is not supported by this bundle; supply the full API root here).

username.description: Gorgias account email used for HTTP Basic auth (sent as the Basic auth username).

password.description: Gorgias API key used for HTTP Basic auth (sent as the Basic auth password); never logged.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
